untranslatable_reason: Head-and-shoulders bottom pattern requires multi-bar structural recognition (three distinct troughs with neckline geometry). Available indicators cannot precisely identify: (1) left shoulder trough, (2) head (lowest point), (3) right shoulder trough as a connected formation, or (4) neckline as a dynamic support level connecting the two shoulders. The pattern also requires identifying 'yearly low' proximity, which would need explicit lookback logic beyond standard indicators. Converted conditions approximate reversal near lows with breakout confirmation, but lack the true pattern structure validation.
